description: A tenant has moved out. For security, the agent must schedule a locksmith to rekey the unit before the next tenant moves in.

nodes.task_description: Identify the unit that has just become vacant.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the unit's status is 'Vacant'.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for a locksmith to rekey the unit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a correctly detailed work order.

nodes.task_description: Assign the work order to an approved locksmith vendor and schedule the service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully dispatches a locksmith to complete the job.
